references.role: global kitchen identity for all Seedance segments
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the Licorn kitchen surfaces, island, material identity, lighting and final hero-shot context. Do not copy exact framing when a macro shot is required.

references.role: raw Paris-Brest crown topology before baking
references.prompt: Generate a raw Paris-Brest crown made of separate piped choux domes touching in a circular ring, each topped with a neat crumble disc. It is not a smooth ring and has no flat edible base underneath.

references.role: baked target topology after oven reveal
references.prompt: Generate the same Paris-Brest crown baked: separate puffed golden choux domes touching in a ring, cracked crumble tops, airy structure, light steam. It is not a smooth donut ring.

references.role: filled Paris-Brest target state for assembly
references.prompt: Generate a horizontally opened Paris-Brest crown filled with satin praline cream rosettes, preserving the repeated choux dome topology.
